name: @browzer/skills
description: AI agent skills to empower your workflow with Browzer — hybrid vector + Graph RAG for codebases and document workspaces. Twenty-three skills around the `browzer` CLI: RAG search, dependency graph, doc ingestion, workspace management, and an end-to-end dev pipeline (brainstorming → generate-prd → generate-task → execute-task → code-review → receiving-code-review → write-tests → update-docs → feature-acceptance → commit → sync-workspace). Code-review spawns 4 mandatory parallel agents — senior-engineer (cyclomatic + DRY + clean code), software-architect (race conditions + clean architecture + caching + perf), qa (regressions + edge cases + butterfly-effect), regression-tester (scoped tests over modified files + browzer deps). Receiving-code-review then closes EVERY finding with a 7-step ladder for zero-tech-debt by default. Write-tests authors green coverage AND runs Stryker/mutmut/go-mutesting in the same pass.
